rationale: This is a static anime IP card-battler ad (Dokkan Battle/Goku) with zero gameplay representation — it can't communicate Destiny Run's swipe-steer, choice-gate, moral-alignment loop. Visually the saturated rainbow + magenta clashes with the game's clean sky-blue/white low-poly aesthetic, and the male shonen-anime audience skews opposite of our female-leaning 13-35 casual base. Do not adapt; the only borrowable element is the bold "PLAY NOW!" CTA stamp, which we already have better-fit references for.
